rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Elec. Code §276.013 addresses election fraud offenses and has no bearing on homestead exemption valuation or tax policy.
quote: Sec. 276.013. ELECTION FRAUD. (a) A person commits an offense if the person knowingly or intentionally makes any effort to:
_note: No overlap between proposed tax exemption change and election fraud statute.
